mapper.insert:
/* otherCompInvMapper.insertOtcpDayInvtr */ INSERT INTO LGS_OTCP_DAY_INVTR ( INVTR_DT, ORGN_ID, PRDT_ID, OLD_YN, GOOD_STRG_INVTR_QNTY, NG_STRG_INVTR_QNTY, IN_DUE_QNTY, OUT_RSV_QNTY, SALE_QTY, CAN_QTY, REGST_ID, REG_DTTM, CHNG_ID, CHNG_DTTM )
SELECT TO_CHAR(SYSDATE - 1, 'YYYYMMDD'), ORGN_ID, PRDT_ID, OLD_YN, GOOD_STRG_INVTR_QNTY, NG_STRG_INVTR_QNTY, IN_DUE_QNTY, OUT_RSV_QNTY, SALE_QTY, CAN_QTY, 'LGSBATCH', SYSDATE, 'LGSBATCH', SYSDATE FROM LGS_OTCP_INVTR
